ecarx.carext.display.view

Interface IWindow


  • public interface IWindow
    This class provides the API for accessing window functionality.
    Since:
    5

    • Method Detail

      • getWindowTypeByCode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WINDOW_TYPE")
default int getWindowTypeByCode(int code)
        Returns window type according to the window code.
        Parameters:
        code - The code of window.
        Returns:
        The type of window.
        Since:
        5
        See Also:
        WindowManager.LayoutParams.type

      • getWindowTypeByCode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WINDOW_TYPE")
default int getWindowTypeByCode(int code,
                                                                                                         @NonNull
                                                                                                         android.view.Display display)
        Returns window type according to the window code and the display.
        Parameters:
        code - The code of window.
        display - The display to show the window on.
        Returns:
        The type of window.
        Since:
        5
        See Also:
        WindowManager.LayoutParams.type

      • registerWindowObserver

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.WINDOW_OBSERVER")
default boolean registerWindowObserver(@NonNull
                                                                                                             WindowObserver observer)
        Register Window observer, A process can only hold one callback instance
        Parameters:
        observer - Window observer
        Since:
        6
        See Also:
        WindowObserver, WindowViewObserver

      • unregisterWindowObserver

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.WINDOW_OBSERVER")
default boolean unregisterWindowObserver(@NonNull
                                                                                                               WindowObserver observer)
        Unregister Window observer
        Parameters:
        observer - Window observer
        Since:
        6
        See Also:
        WindowObserver, WindowViewObserver
